Card.Title: Sobre mí
Content: Me llamo Johan Omar Duque Pereira. Actualmente realizo proyectos de manera autodidacta. Además, sigo estudiando la carrera de Ingeniería Informática en mi
. Aunque también sigo aprendiendo mediante cursos en la academia de
donde he aprendido tecnologías como TypeScript o React.
Soy estudiante de Ingeniería Informática, se usar tecnologías relacionadas con el Front-End como
Java Script, HTML, CSS, React y TypeScript.
Además, también se usar lenguajes mas orientados al Backend como

Programming_Experience.Title: Laboratorio Clínico
Programming_Experience.Content: Desarrollo de un Laboratorio Clínico como proyecto final de programación, fue un trabajo junto a otros 2 compañeros donde debíamos usar solo Lenguaje C. Además, usamos Git y GitHub como herramientas

Programming_Experience.Title: Informe sobre Fotones y Energia cuantica
Programming_Experience.Content: Trabajo de química, relacionado con la energía cuántica y los fotones. además, de ver la historia de científicos como Max Plank y Albert Einstein.

Programming_Experience.Title: Creación de Web con WordPress
Programming_Experience.Content: Cree una página web con WordPress, era una tienda de venta de productos con estampados florales, dicha tienda generaba ingresos con la afiliación de Amazon

Work_Experience.Title: Sellador de Bolsas
Work_Experience.Content: Trabajé para la empresa de mi padre como sellador de bolsas plásticas en una empresa dedicada a la producción de materiales plásticos.

Work_Experience.Title: Dependiente
Work_Experience.Content: Trabajé como dependiente de uno de los negocios de mi madre enfocado en la venta de dulces para postres, ayudando también en el apartado del inventario.

Work_Experience.Title: Personal de logística
Work_Experience.Content: Me dedicaba a contar mercancía, ordenarla y empacarla para posteriormente distribuirla diferentes negocios, ya que la empresa era una distribuidora de materiales plásticos.

Projects.descripcion: Desarrollo de un software de un Laboratorio Clínico como proyecto final, fue un trabajo grupal con otros 2 compañeros donde debíamos usar únicamente Lenguaje C. Usamos otras tecnologías como Git y GitHub para facilitar el desarrollo

Languages.description: Aprendí JavaScript de manera autodidacta. Además, de cursar en la academia de Platzi donde saque certificaciones
Aprendí React inicialmente con Platzi en donde me certifique. Después, aprendí más por mi propia cuenta
Aprendí HTML inicialmente por YouTube, después mejoré con Platzi y realizando proyectos
Aprendí CSS inicialmente por YouTube, después mejoré con Platzi y realizando proyectos
Aprendí TypeScript 100% gracias a Platzi donde me certifique, actualmente sigo aprendiendo cosas más avanzadas sobre esta tecnología

Content: My name is Johan Omar Duque Pereira. I am currently working on self-taught projects. Additionally, I continue to study Computer Engineering at my
. while also learning through courses at the
academy, where I have learned technologies like TypeScript or React.
I am a Computer Engineering student, and I know how to use Front-End related technologies such as
Java Script, HTML, CSS, React y TypeScript.
Additionally, I also know how to use more Backend-oriented languages like

Programming_Experience.Title: Clinical Laboratory
Programming_Experience.Content: Development of a Clinical Laboratory as a final programming project. It was a collaborative work with 2 other classmates where we had to use only the C Language. Additionally, we used Git and GitHub as tools.

Programming_Experience.Title: Report on Photons and Quantum Energy
Programming_Experience.Content: Chemistry work, related to quantum energy and photons. Furthermore, we explored the history of scientists like Max Plank and Albert Einstein.

Programming_Experience.Title: WordPress Web Creation
Programming_Experience.Content: I created a website with WordPress, it was a store selling products with floral prints. This store generated income through Amazon affiliate marketing.

Work_Experience.Title: Bag Sealer
Work_Experience.Content: I worked for my father's company as a plastic bag sealer in a company dedicated to the production of plastic materials.

Work_Experience.Title: Sales Clerk
Work_Experience.Content: I worked as a sales clerk in one of my mother's businesses focused on selling sweets for desserts, also helping with the inventory section.

Work_Experience.Title: Logistics Staff
Work_Experience.Content: I was dedicated to counting merchandise, organizing it, and packing it for subsequent distribution to different businesses, as the company was a distributor of plastic materials.

Projects.descripcion: Development of a Clinical Laboratory software as a final project. It was a group work with 2 other classmates where we had to use only C Language. We used other technologies like Git and GitHub to facilitate development.
Chemistry work, related to quantum energy and photons. Furthermore, we explored the history of scientists like Max Plank and Albert Einstein.

Languages.description: I learned JavaScript self-taught. In addition, I took courses at the Platzi academy where I obtained certifications.
I initially learned React with Platzi where I got certified. Afterwards, I learned more on my own.
I initially learned HTML through YouTube, then improved with Platzi and by doing projects.
I initially learned CSS through YouTube, then improved with Platzi and by doing projects.
I learned TypeScript 100% thanks to Platzi where I got certified, currently I continue to learn more advanced things about this technology.
I learned Python self-taught, watching YouTube and doing Logic exercises, but I plan to specialize further to use Django and be more complete.
I learned Java on my own, and I also got certified at the polytechnic of Colombia, currently it is used in my university.
I learned C at the University, also by watching YouTube and doing final projects.

Tools.description: I learned Git initially through YouTube, although I later finished understanding version control better with Platzi, where I got certified.
I learned GitHub initially on my own, then with Platzi I studied the use of Dependabot, CodeSpaces, Tokens, SSH, etc. In addition to getting certified.
I learned to use Visual Studio Code on my own at first, then it became my main code editor for any project.
